Product.bookDemo:
With the goal of accompanying customers, Udata will support customers to use the free demo. The specific demo program is as follows:

  • With software Pambu OEE: Customers will be able to experience the basic version on a production machine for 2 months.
  • With software Pambu PMS: Customers will experience the basic version on 1 electrical load for 2 months.
  • All hardware equipment Pambu provides and installs free of charge, customers provide Internet infrastructure.

The steps to plan the demo are as follows:

  • Site survey of equipment to be demoed at customer's site.
  • Up configuration and installation time.
  • Agree on terms of installation and maintenance of demo assets.
  • Install demo and listen to customer feedback.

Do not hesitate any longer without immediately contacting the Pambu team at the hotline 0387 430 957 or fill out the form below to use the product. Pambu is pleased to accompany you!

heroSection.heading: Pambu OEE - Machine maintenance and performance management solutions
heroSection.excerpt: Pambu OEE is a comprehensive solution to help businesses effectively manage machines and production lines. Support to analyze production data based on the collected data of Pambu OEE to provide reports and warnings to help customers make timely decisions.

features.title: Data is collected directly, continuously
features.desc: Minimize the risk of errors, ensure objectivity.

features.title: Provide forecasts and warnings to customers.
features.desc: Based on the analysis of production activity data from real data collected.

features.title: Export formatted reports in multiple templates.
features.desc: Serving many different departments in the factory but still ensuring data consistency.

features.title: Run on cross-platform, anytime and anywhere.
features.desc: Helping the ability to manage and operate the plant more efficiently.

features.title: Extend the scope with the module structure

data.title: Collect and statistics the number of products produced by each machine, each line
Collecting and statistics of machine stop errors
Continuously monitor the operating status of the machine in each production shift
Store machine operators, repair history, replacement history of materials and equipment
Early warning of the expiry date of replacement supplies, predictive maintenance

data.answer: OEE stands for Overall Equipment Effectiveness which is a measure of the effectiveness of a device...See details here

data.ask: Why should we use Pambu OEE ?
data.answer:
Difficulties that most factories often encounter in the production process:

- Data is recorded manually, easily confused due to human factors

- Want to improve the working efficiency of machines and lines but don't know where to start?

- Data is needed to analyze the operation situation and cause of machine failure

- Failure to assess risks, possible incidents in the future

Before those difficulties, Pambu OEE will help the factory to solve the above problems easily and economically.

data.ask: What does the installation cost include?
data.answer:
Including hardware and software installation:

- Hardware products are selected from large corporations such as Mitsubishi, Siemens, Schneider, etc.

- The software is researched, developed and thoroughly tested. Besides, after using Pambu products, each new version will automatically update for free for users.

For more information please schedule a demo here or call directly to get advice from a team of experts via hotline: 0387 430 957
Distribution network throughout the country with two offices located in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh for the purpose that customers are best supported by Pambu's team of experts.

data.ask: How long will the information be stored?

AboutUs.title: About us
AboutUs.content:
Developed since 2022. In 2024, Udata is invested by DHG.

Udata aims to become a software platform leading Vietnam and Southeast Asia in the field of energy management, IoT data analysis on cloud data platform (SaaS), we provide comprehensive solution for businesses and organizations to help analyze and optimize energy consumption, IoT operating parameters from machines, environment, equipment, ... from That reduces costs, increases productivity, and contributes to achieving sustainable development goals.

Udata brings together enthusiasm and creative intelligence in the fields of technology and management, together Hands on creating a green future. From the management team, partners, investors, to businesses using Udata, we all share a common vision: As a companion to businesses, optimize performance, reduce costs and create a more sustainable energy system.

Let's optimize your productivity with Udata today!
AboutUs.excerpt: Let's optimize your productivity with Udata today!

heroSection.title: Taking Control of Your Energy Efficiency
heroSection.subTitle: Rooftop solar power operation management solution
heroSection.desc: With a rooftop solar power monitoring and management system, you can have comprehensive control over your system anytime, anywhere. Our platform provides real-time monitoring features real-time alerts when errors are detected, and performance analysis tools to optimize energy flow and increase operational efficiency This solution helps you not only monitor but also proactively manage , maintain and optimize your energy system, ensuring that you always get the most from your renewable energy investments.

lists.title: Seamless integration with other systems
lists.content: Integrate your rooftop solar PV system with existing energy management systems to optimize energy flow and improve system efficiency.

first.title: Real-Time Performance Monitoring
first.subTitle: A section focusing on how real-time data and performance analytics provide transparency into system performance.
first.desc: Our platform provides detailed information about your solar energy output, allowing you to track key metrics such as output, inverter performance. Use performance data historical performance to identify inefficiencies and make data-driven decisions to optimize energy use.

second.title: Automatic Alerts and Proactive Maintenance
second.subTitle: Explains how the system sends notifications when performance thresholds are crossed, helping to take quick action on system errors.
second.desc: Avoid downtime with our smart alert system. Receive real-time notifications of any issues affecting your solar power system output, ensuring your system operating at peak performance.

third.title: Report an anomaly
third.subTitle: Focuses on the ability to synthesize information from anomalies that give warnings about revenue loss.
third.desc: We provide you with abnormal reports by day, week, and month. With specific and intuitive numbers, you can immediately grasp the problem occurring in the system, helping you make a decision immediately.

four.title: Seamless Integration with Your Energy System
four.subTitle: Focuses on integration with existing energy management systems.
four.desc: Our rooftop solar solutions integrate seamlessly with your existing energy infrastructure. Manage solar, grid and storage all from one platform , optimize energy flow and reduce costs.

callToAction.title: Get Started with Rooftop Solar Power Monitoring Solution?
callToAction.content: Ready to optimize your solar power system? Contact us to learn more about how our solutions can help you improve efficiency, increase revenue and more more like that.

heroSection.title: Environmental control and increased productivity
heroSection.subTitle: Optimal solution for the seafood industry
heroSection.desc: Udata is a smart monitoring solution for the seafood industry, helping to control the farming environment effectively and optimize productivity. This system continuously monitors important water quality parameters, Early warning of pollution risks and monitoring of animal growth. Experience it now.

lists.content: Udata collects growth data of breeds, including weight, size, etc. The system helps you closely monitor the development process of breeds, identify abnormal trends early to take action. timely intervention.

lists.title: Smart Alerts and Automatic Notifications
lists.content: Receive automatic alerts about system errors or potential contamination. Customize thresholds to receive email or SMS notifications, helping you stay proactive about unexpected problems.

lists.title: Report an anomaly
lists.content: Synthesis of abnormalities in data collected in the system. Indicates abnormal growth rate of breeds with daily, weekly, and monthly reports.

first.title: Water quality monitoring
first.subTitle: The system allows to collect and centralize real-time data from many different sources
first.desc: Udata is a comprehensive water quality monitoring system that helps you continuously monitor important parameters such as pH, salinity, temperature, dissolved oxygen content, etc. with an advanced sensor system Udata provides an intuitive, easy-to-use interface that allows you to monitor parameters directly on your mobile device or computer by continuously monitoring quality parameters water, Udata helps you control the farming environment effectively, limit the risk of disease and pollution, and improve production efficiency, making it a useful tool for aquaculture farms.

second.title: Monitoring the growth level of breeding animals
second.subTitle: Udata collects data on the weight and size of animals, analyzes the data and displays the results in graphs and reports, helping you easily monitor and evaluate growth rates of the breed.
second.desc: Udata not only monitors water quality but also expands functions to track and monitor the growth level of breeding animals. The system collects data on weight, growth rate, and analysis data, detect unusual trends.

third.title: Smart Alerts and Automatic Notifications
third.subTitle: The system sends notifications when data exceeds the safety threshold, helping to detect and resolve problems quickly.
third.desc: Receive real-time notifications about all issues affecting the farming environment and the growth rate of the breed. Customize the threshold settings according to experience, any abnormalities will be recorded and Warning via Email/SMS. Early warning will help keep pets safe from harmful environmental factors.

four.title: Report an anomaly
four.subTitle: Focuses on the ability to synthesize information from anomalies and produce a comprehensive report.
four.desc: We provide you with abnormal reports by day, week, and month. With specific and intuitive numbers, you can immediately grasp the problem that is happening in your farm system. you immediately.

callToAction.title: Start increasing your productivity?
callToAction.content: Ready to increase your production? Contact us to learn more about how our solution can help you monitor your livestock environment, track the growth rate of your animals , increase revenue and more.

heroSection.heading: Power Management Software
heroSection.excerpt: Energy management software that helps you monitor production and more.

lists.title: Manage multiple locations simultaneously
lists.desc: Collect data in different locations, unlimited geographical distance, centralized management at a single platform.

lists.title: Preventing excessive energy use
lists.desc: Collect active power, reactive power and warn when threshold is exceeded. Quickly detect overload points.

lists.title: Optimization for the Solar industry
lists.desc: Collect data from inverters, sensors and data loggers. Evaluate effectiveness through visual graphs.

lists.title: Unlimited data
lists.desc: Collect data from a variety of different data sources: EVN electricity bills, clean water bills, data from sensors, meters, loggers and more.

lists.title: Measure, verify and act
lists.desc: Standard model from problem detection, information validation and troubleshooting. Timely detection and quick action are prerequisites to help you improve energy efficiency, increase High durability equipment.

lists.title: Runs on multiple devices and anytime, anywhere
lists.desc: Helps manage and operate the factory more effectively.

status.desc: Devices connected at the same time

data.ask: Does Udata PMS have to be installed? What platform does it run on? Does it take up memory?
data.answer: PMS runs on a web browser, so this software can run on many devices with web browsers: laptops, tablets, smartphones, etc. PMS does not need to be installed so it takes up very little memory ( trivial).

data.ask: Where is the data stored? Is it safe?
data.answer: Udata's data is stored on the world's leading Cloud Provider Digital Ocean and complies with ISO 27001 security standards.

data.ask: Udata can manage a maximum of how many devices?
data.answer: Udata manages an unlimited number of connected devices.

heroSection.heading: SaaS
heroSection.excerpt: Udata is a cloud software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform for data analysis and management.

lists.title: Real-time data collection and analysis
lists.desc: Our solution excels in its ability to collect and analyze data quickly and accurately. By continuously monitoring operations, we help you detect problems early potential and provide timely solutions

lists.title: ISO 50001 Standard
lists.desc: Promote the implementation of the ISO 50001 Energy Management System. Collect data automatically, track relevant energy performance indicators, establish reference scenarios and measure save energy according to IPMVP instructions

lists.title: Easy to use
lists.desc: Udata simplifies the operations manager's work and saves time. In one day of training, you will master the platform and customize it in a completely autonomous way

lists.title: Automatic warnings
lists.desc: This helps organizations save time and resources, identify potential problems early, and then take timely measures to adjust and optimize operations

lists.title: Customize Dashboard
lists.desc: By allowing users to customize the interface and indicators according to specific needs, it helps optimize information management and effective decision making

lists.title: Ability to assign permissions by role, by location, by data type
lists.desc: Flexibility in decentralization helps ensure that only people with appropriate permissions can access and manipulate necessary data, thereby increasing security and operational efficiency

first.title: The only application in Vietnam that allows multi-location, multi-device management of many different manufacturers on the same platform.
first.desc: With the desire to provide an effective and comprehensive management solution, we have developed the first and only application in Vietnam that allows synchronous management of multiple locations, multiple devices from different locations. different manufacturers on the same platform, this helps businesses optimize management processes, save time and improve operational efficiency.

second.title: The only application in Vietnam that allows automatic warnings to customers according to scenarios set by the user.
second.desc: Our application is a pioneering solution in Vietnam, providing smart automatic warning features. Thanks to that, customers can proactively set up warning scenarios to suit their needs. specific requirements, ensuring all incidents are detected and handled promptly, improving management efficiency and minimizing risks.

third.title: The only application that allows customization and periodic sending of various types of reports: loss reports, frequently occurring error analysis reports,...
third.desc: Our application is a leading solution, allowing you to customize and create reports according to the specific requirements of your business. From detailed loss reports to error analysis reports Usually, all information is synthesized and presented clearly, helping you make accurate and timely decisions.

contents.title: FIT
contents.content: Ready to meet user needs in many economic fields

heroSection.heading: Unlock your data with Udata
heroSection.excerpt: For effective data-driven energy management, having centralized and structured data is key. We are committed to helping you collect and integrate data quickly and easily, ensuring that you never experience delays or hitches in the process.

lists.title: Independent of data source
lists.desc: Udata is a flexible solution that supports connecting and processing data from a variety of sources such as data loggers, grid operators, IoT sensors... Whether your data is Whatever format and protocol, we can integrate and exploit effectively.

lists.title: Offline data storage
lists.desc: We store your data for up to 30 days when there is a network outage. Your data will always be updated and guaranteed to be accurate.

lists.title: Data migration and data integration
lists.desc: With professional data migration services, we will help you make a smooth transition from old energy management software to the Udata platform. Not only that, Udata also has the ability to integrate compatible with many different systems, helping you build a comprehensive energy management solution that suits the unique needs of your business.

data.ask: Is my data on Udata safe?
data.answer: Your data is absolutely secure when using Udata. All information is stored on servers and backed up daily. Our system complies with ISO security standards 27001, ensuring your data is always safe.

data.ask: Does Udata own the data I put into the platform?
data.answer: No. You are the sole owner of your data. We only store it for you to analyze and get its real value.

data.ask: Can Udata help me improve data quality?
data.answer: Udata has many features that help you improve data quality. An alert will be triggered if any of your devices are no longer sending data to Udata and it will calculate the availability of data at all times. You can also correct incorrect data based on rules.

callToAction.title: Data Migration & Integration
callToAction.subTitle: Are you using the same system and want to switch to Udata?
callToAction.content: Udata provides professional data integration and migration services, helping you upgrade your current energy management system. We support data migration from different systems to the platform Udata, ensures data integrity and security. In addition, we provide integrated solutions to connect Udata with other systems in your business.
